creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report Aaron.

Could you please provide further details including:

- Exact FreeBSD version (uname -a output)
- pkg version -v output (as an attachment)

@Piotr Could you please update all your port maintainer lines to match your @FreeBSD.org address. This will ensure the Bugzilla auto-assigner can work for issues created for ports you maintain.
